app.name: InnerTable
app.tagline: Get food recs from your trusted inner circle and pull a seat up to your inner table.
app.vision: In 3 years, Inner Table will be the category-defining recommendation app for friend groups who believe the best reviews come from people who know you.
app.mission: We believe the best restaurant recommendation isn't from an algorithm or a stranger — it's from a friend who knows you. Inner Table is where your inner circle keeps its list: the places worth going, the ones worth skipping, and the ones you can't wait to try together.

items.title: Edit/update comments
items.description:
Current Behaviour: Once comments are saved, they cannot be changed even by the original commenter.

Expected Behaviour: Comments should be editable or delete-able by the original commenter.  "Comments deleted" should be shown for deleted entries so that subsequent replies would still show in the correct order.
items.acceptanceCriteria:
- Comments can be edited within the app by the original commenter.
- Comment can be deleted within the app by the original commenter.
- Comments cannot be edited or delted by someone who did not make the comment.

releases.name: bug fixes
releases.goals: Add early feedback bug fixes and enhancements.
